description: Deadly clash between Indian and Chinese troops at Galwan Valley, Ladakh. 20 Indian soldiers killed. Worst India-China military confrontation in decades.
India hosted the G20 leaders' summit in New Delhi. Produced the New Delhi Declaration with consensus on global challenges.
QUAD leaders met in Hiroshima on sidelines of G7. Announced Indo-Pacific Maritime Domain Awareness initiative.
India signed €7.87B deal with France for 36 Rafale fighter jets. First delivery in 2020.
Russia began delivering S-400 Triumf air defense systems to India despite US CAATSA sanctions threat.
US law providing $52.7B in subsidies for domestic semiconductor manufacturing. Aims to reduce dependence on Asian chip production.
Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine. Largest ground war in Europe since WWII. India maintained neutral stance.
India became the fourth country to land on the Moon. Vikram lander touched down near the lunar south pole.
Canada accused India of involvement in killing of Hardeep Singh Nijjar. Diplomatic expulsions followed.
India commissioned its first indigenous aircraft carrier INS Vikrant (IAC-1). Built by Cochin Shipyard.
India's first major defense export. Philippines purchased BrahMos shore-based anti-ship missiles for $375M.
Economic corridor announced at G20. Connects India to Europe via Middle East through rail and shipping links.
ISRO launched India's first solar observatory. Positioned at L1 Lagrange point to study the Sun.
World's largest democratic exercise. 970M eligible voters. BJP-led NDA won third consecutive term.
Annual QUAD naval exercise. India, US, Japan, Australia conducted anti-submarine warfare and maritime interdiction drills.
Landmark international climate accord. 196 parties committed to limit warming to 1.5°C above pre-industrial levels.
28th UN Climate Change Conference in Dubai. First Global Stocktake of Paris Agreement progress.
Economic Cooperation and Trade Agreement between India and Australia. Reduces tariffs on goods and services.
India's military recruitment reform. Short-term 4-year enlistment for Agniveers across all three services.
US House Speaker Pelosi visited Taiwan. China responded with unprecedented military exercises surrounding Taiwan.
India announced $10B incentive plan to attract semiconductor manufacturing. Tata and Micron announced fabs.
SCO summit where Modi told Putin 'this is not an era of war'. Key moment in India's diplomatic positioning.
India's UPI payment system went international. Linked with Singapore's PayNow and expanding to UAE, France.
Devastating M7.8 earthquake killed 50,000+ in Turkey and Syria. India sent NDRF rescue teams.

canonicalName: India Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023
description: India's first comprehensive data protection law. Governs personal data processing with consent requirements.
BRICS expanded to include Egypt, Ethiopia, Iran, Saudi Arabia, UAE. Effective Jan 2024.
Extremely severe cyclone that hit Gujarat coast. Over 180,000 evacuated. Minimal casualties due to early warning.
India became first Asian nation to reach Mars orbit. ISRO's Mangalyaan cost just $74M — cheapest Mars mission.
Australia to acquire nuclear-powered submarines with US-UK tech. France lost $66B submarine contract.
India and China agreed on patrolling arrangements at Depsang and Demchok. First major breakthrough since Galwan 2020.
Massive M9.1 earthquake triggered tsunami killing 230,000+. Reshaped Indian Ocean disaster preparedness.
India commissioned its second nuclear ballistic missile submarine INS Arighat, strengthening nuclear triad.

aliases: Initiative on Critical and Emerging Technology
description: India-US initiative to deepen cooperation on AI, quantum, semiconductors, space, and defense technology.
India's indigenous medium-weight fighter completed first flight. Key to replacing aging MiG-21 fleet.
PM Modi launched 5G services in India. Jio and Airtel deployed across major cities.
